archimate:Grouping.name: Jurisdiction
archimate:Grouping.documentation:
Definition: Jurisdiction ABB is a Grouping that refers to the limits or territory within which authority may be exercised.
Source: CPV
Source reference: https://semiceu.github.io/Core-Person-Vocabulary/releases/2.00/#Jurisdiction

properties.value: Jurisdiction ABB is a Grouping that refers to the limits or territory within which authority may be exercised.
